title: strangea linearis
intro: Strangea linearis, also known as the Golden Yarrow or Desert Yarrow, is a perennial shrub native to South Africa. This plant is used in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Strangea linearis include treating wounds, relieving fever, and alleviating respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma. Herbal preparations of Strangea linearis include infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which can be used topically or ingested to harness its medicinal properties.
